criteria.name: FWI tests validate outputs against reference vectors
criteria.evidence: tests/test_fwi_vectors.py defines FFMC_VECTORS, DMC_VECTORS, DC_VECTORS with expected output values, but test functions (test_ffmc_vectors_exist, test_dmc_vectors_exist, test_dc_vectors_exist) only assert previous_code >= 0 and expected >= 0. No test calls fine_fuel_moisture_code, duff_moisture_code, or drought_code and compares the result to the expected value within tolerance. The expected values are dead data — never used for assertion.

criteria.name: DMC and DC implementations in fwi.py
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/fwi.py contains only fine_fuel_moisture_code. No duff_moisture_code or drought_code functions exist. DMC_VECTORS and DC_VECTORS in tests reference expected values but have no implementation to test against.

criteria.name: Imputation framework with audit trail
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/imputation.py does not exist. tests/test_imputation.py does not exist. No imputation code anywhere in the project. Spec requires configurable strategy (short-gap interpolation, long-gap preserve missingness) and audit trail (station, variable, time range, method, count affected).

criteria.name: QA/QC summary artifacts
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/qa_qc.py does not exist. tests/test_qa_qc.py does not exist. No QA/QC automation anywhere. Spec requires missingness by station/variable, duplicate timestamp detection, out-of-range value detection, and coverage summary.

criteria.name: Loader handles multiple schema families
criteria.evidence: normalized_loader.py::load_normalized_station_csv calls recognize_schema but only uses its result to set a column value (schema_family). The timestamp parsing hardcodes format='%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S %z' regardless of schema family. The manifest recognizes 4 schema families but only one timestamp format is handled. Other families would fail silently with no NotImplementedError. The test only covers minimal_date_time_family.

criteria.name: Explore notebook smoke test
criteria.evidence: tests/test_explore_smoke.py does not exist. No automated verification that the Phase 3 explore notebook is executable or that its imports succeed. If the notebook broke, no test would catch it.

summary: REJECT — all 6 phase-7 acceptance criteria fail. The two new commits (cf85f65, 9993937) since last review contain only orchestrator infra changes and the previous UnRalph verdict — no source code or test changes. No remediation work has been started: imputation.py, qa_qc.py, and test_explore_smoke.py do not exist; fwi.py is missing DMC and DC implementations; test_fwi_vectors.py asserts non-negativity instead of calling functions and comparing outputs; normalized_loader.py hardcodes a single timestamp format. The exit command fails immediately because 3 of 5 required test files are missing.
